cart.promo_success_suffix: successfully applied on all eligible items.
cart.clear_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to remove all items from the cart? This action cannot be undone.
cart.clear_confirm_sub: All calculated configurations will be lost.

ai.title: AI Packaging Assistant
ai.placeholder: Ask about sizes, prices or packaging advice...
ai.intro: Hello! I am your AI Packaging Assistant. Let me help you choose the best sizing and style for your needs.
ai.suggestion_1: What premium boxes do you recommend?
ai.suggestion_2: How is the pricing of bags determined?
ai.suggestion_3: Which paper should I use for business cards?

inquiry_modal.title: Order Inquiry
inquiry_modal.name: Your Name
inquiry_modal.success_msg: Your custom request was sent successfully! Our specialist will reach out shortly.
inquiry_modal.phone_required_error: Please fill in your Phone Number.
inquiry_modal.msg_whatsapp_hello: Hello, I would like to place an order.
inquiry_modal.success_desc: Your order inquiry has been successfully registered. Click the button below to send it to us.
inquiry_modal.form_desc: Please enter your details to submit your packaging inquiry to CAPSULE PACK.

bags.name: Paper Bags (Standard)
bags.heroDesc: Charming custom-branded bags with 210g & 300g premium art paper

boxes.name: Packaging Boxes
boxes.heroDesc: Rigid core luxury structures or folding cardboard models of various thickness
boxes.ruleChips: Rigid Box | Full CMYK Printing | Magnetic locks

ribbons.name: Branded Ribbons
ribbons.heroDesc: Rich satin and reps ribbons with luxurious metallic foil and screen printing
ribbons.ruleChips: 2 cm, 2.5 cm, 3 cm, 4 cm widths | Glamorous hot foil | Deep color choices

stickers.name: Custom Stickers
stickers.heroDesc: Perfect contour-cut custom-sized sticker assets on vinyl or high-quality paper
stickers.ruleChips: Any custom shape | Waterproof vinyl option | Matte or glossy

giftcards.name: Gift Cards & Envelopes
giftcards.heroDesc: Exquisite gift vouchers, certificates, and premium designer envelopes
giftcards.ruleChips: Shiny Hot Foil | Textured Papers | Color Envelope Bundles

businesscards.name: Business Cards
businesscards.heroDesc: Elite cardboards with tactile soft-touch layers, texture layouts, or gold foil accents
businesscards.ruleChips: 350g & 400g Premium Stocks | Round or Sharp edges | Versatile counts

other_products.name: Other Printed Products
other_products.heroDesc: Wide range of custom printed materials: brochures, flyers, posters, and boutique accessories
other_products.ruleChips: Individual Quotation | Eco Materials | Precision Colors

qr_matrix.name: QR / Data Matrix Codes
qr_matrix.heroDesc: Serialized labels and high-density 2D matrix stickers with custom database integration
qr_matrix.ruleChips: 100% Scannable | Water-resistant film | Custom sequence generation

qr_matrix_items.name: QR / Data Matrix Labels
qr_matrix_items.desc: Self-adhesive tracking tags with unique serialized codes

other_products_items.name: Flyers & Marketing Materials
other_products_items.desc: High-quality promotional leaflets of standard A5, A6 or DL sizes

boxes_items.name: Boutique Boxes
boxes_items.desc: Premium rigid setup boxes and folding cardboard packages

ribbons_items.name: Branded Ribbons
ribbons_items.desc: Luxury satin and reps ribbon bows with dynamic foil branding

stickers_items.name: Die-cut Stickers
stickers_items.desc: Contour waterproof vinyl labels and product tags

giftcards_items.name: Gift Certificates
giftcards_items.desc: Elegant certificates and premium card-holder envelopes

businesscards_items.name: Business Cards
businesscards_items.desc: Sophisticated visiting and networking cards with deluxe paper stock

contact.heading: Get In Touch
contact.message_placeholder: Write your inquiry, custom sizes, or questions here...
contact.message_success: Thank you! Your message was saved and email draft prepared.

calc.card_2_desc_box: Select the external appearance and opening mechanism of the box
calc.card_3_desc_box: Specify material rigidity, lamination, and print quality options
calc.card_4_desc_box: Add premium holographic or foil decorations to your box
calc.card_5_desc_box: Get significant wholesale price drops on larger volumes
calc.card_1_desc_other: Select custom print products and marketing materials
calc.card_2_desc_other: Specify required run amount and enter detailed technical comments
calc.card_1_desc_qr: Select the serialized code type, label size, or scan density option
calc.card_1_desc_ribbon: Select ribbon base type, width, and customized branding print color
calc.card_2_desc_ribbon: Specify required length (minimum order size is 100 meters)
calc.error_box_lid_height: Lid & Base box minimum height (H) must be 3.5 cm.
calc.error_box_lid_min_dim: Lid & Base box length and width must be at least 8 cm.
calc.error_box_lid_ratio: Lid & Base height cannot exceed 1.5 times the length or width to stay structurally durable.
calc.error_box_drawer_height: Sleeve Drawer box minimum height (H) must be 3.0 cm.
calc.error_box_drawer_min_dim: Sleeve Drawer box length and width must be at least 8 cm.
calc.error_box_drawer_ratio: Sleeve Drawer height cannot exceed 60% of length or width for optimal traction.
calc.error_box_magnetic_height: Magnetic Flap box minimum height (H) must be 3.0 cm.
calc.error_box_magnetic_min_dim: Magnetic Flap box length and width must be at least 10 cm for folding accuracy.
calc.error_box_magnetic_ratio: Magnetic box height cannot exceed 65% of length or width to hold magnetic latching.
calc.error_box_shoulder_height: Shoulder Neck box minimum height (H) must be 3.0 cm.
calc.error_box_shoulder_min_dim: Shoulder Neck box length and width must be at least 8 cm.
calc.error_box_shoulder_ratio: Shoulder box height cannot exceed 1.5 times the length or width.
calc.error_box_rigid_height: Rigid board boxes require a minimum H of 3.0 cm.
calc.error_box_invalid_dim: Box dimensions are invalid (width/length min 2 cm, height min 0.5 cm).
calc.other_notes_placeholder: e.g. dimensions, custom lamination type, other requests...
calc.qr_notes_placeholder: e.g. data URLs, serialization range (0001-1000), or other specifics...
